purpose: Minimal executable bounded machine-facing facade for read/query, proposal submission, proposal review evidence/log-link continuity conformance, and bounded operator inspection of recent continuity-validation outcomes

runtime.write_behavior: proposal-only write lane; canonical write/apply out of scope

operations.name: get_object_by_id
operations.notes: Executable in this slice; resolves one bounded object under allowed knowledge classes.

operations.name: list_objects
operations.notes: Executable in this slice; bounded object discovery with class and limit controls.

operations.name: submit_proposal
operations.notes: Executable in this slice via bounded POST /v1/submit_proposal and deterministic proposal artifact write under proposals/submitted; canonical apply remains deferred.

operations.name: get_proposal_status
operations.notes: Executable in this slice via bounded GET /v1/get_proposal_status using proposal artifacts under proposals/submitted.

operations.name: review_proposal_status
operations.notes: Executable in this slice via bounded POST /v1/review_proposal_status; only status transitions inside proposal artifacts plus append-only continuity log-link records are allowed.

operations.name: get_proposal_review_evidence
operations.authority: read/query over proposal review evidence and log-link continuity only
operations.notes: Executable in this slice via bounded GET /v1/get_proposal_review_evidence; enforces bounded review-history shape plus append-only log-link continuity validation before returning review events/evidence, and emits bounded deterministic continuity diagnostics on fail-closed rejection.

operations.name: list_recent_continuity_validation_outcomes
operations.authority: read/query over bounded recent continuity-validation outcomes only
operations.notes: Executable in this slice via bounded GET /v1/list_recent_continuity_validation_outcomes; derives deterministic recent validated/failed outcomes from existing proposal artifacts and proposal review continuity records with explicit small limits.

non_goals: Unbounded filesystem or canonical write access
